name: Flippy Engine Agent Behavior Hook
description: Enforces repository-specific coding and review constraints for the Flippy Engine.

rules.message: Always consult AGENTS.md and SKILL.md before editing code. Preserve module separation, enforce production-grade implementations, and prefer existing repo structure over new monolithic files.
Do not introduce or leave any pass, ..., or # TODO in structural code. Every method must be fully implemented.
SQLite persistence must initialize WAL mode via PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL to support concurrent reads during ingestion.
RL observation vectors must be explicitly cast to np.float32 for Stable-Baselines3 compatibility.
This repository must use real hardened data sources; do not implement mock or placeholder data flows.
